# sagemcom-fast-5598 Provider

The Sagemcom F@st router provider uses the router's backend REST API to configure the router.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    sagemcom-fast-5598 = {
      source = "registry.terraform.io/francis-fisher/sagemcom-fast-5598"
    }
  }
}

provider "sagemcom-fast-5598" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoint` (String) The IP address or URL of the Sagemcom router REST API.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for router administration.

### Optional

- `username` (String) The username for router administration. Defaults to `admin`.
